scoring._summary: Analyzed 40 scored results across 2 scenario(s) and 4 condition(s). Top condition: twining-lite (mean=82.7).

conditions._summary: 0/6 condition pairs significantly different after Holm-Bonferroni correction; 0/3 pairs vs 'baseline' are significant.

coordination.summary: Analyzed 149 sessions across 4 conditions. Overall engagement rate: 46% (68/149 sessions used Twining). Non-engagement flagged for: baseline, shared-markdown.

power_analysis.verdict: effect (d=0.12) is below detectable threshold (MDES=1.32) — inconclusive, not evidence of no effect
effect (d=0.10) is below detectable threshold (MDES=1.32) — inconclusive, not evidence of no effect
effect (d=0.28) is below detectable threshold (MDES=1.32) — inconclusive, not evidence of no effect

at_5_iterations.note: Going from 3→5 iterations costs ~66% more but detects medium effects (d≈0.6) at 80% power

disordinal_interactions.interpretation: baseline and full-twining have reversed rankings across scenarios — no single condition is universally better
baseline and shared-markdown have reversed rankings across scenarios — no single condition is universally better

harness_summary.headline: twining-lite ranks #1 with 82.7 composite but lift is not statistically significant (need more runs)

items.message: Reduce tool surface area: full-twining (80.6) scores lower than twining-lite (82.7)
Broken scorer: dimension 'completion' has zero variance (always 65) — fix or remove
No statistically significant coordination lift detected — coordination tools may not be providing measurable value
Scenario 'multi-session-build' x 'shared-markdown' has ceiling effect (mean=96.4, std=2.5) — consider redesigning for more discrimination
Insensitive scorer: dimension 'completion' has only 0.0-point spread across conditions
Insensitive scorer: dimension 'cumulativeRework' has only 0.8-point spread across conditions
Insensitive scorer: dimension 'orientation-efficiency' has only 3.4-point spread across conditions
Interaction effect: baseline vs full-twining ranking reverses across scenarios — no universal winner
Interaction effect: baseline vs shared-markdown ranking reverses across scenarios — no universal winner
Interaction effect: full-twining vs shared-markdown ranking reverses across scenarios — no universal winner
Interaction effect: full-twining vs twining-lite ranking reverses across scenarios — no universal winner
Interaction effect: shared-markdown vs twining-lite ranking reverses across scenarios — no universal winner
High scorer variance (CV>20%) in 7 scenario x condition pairs for dimensions: architecturalDrift, context-accuracy, finalQuality, redundant-rework
Inconclusive comparisons (full-twining, shared-markdown, twining-lite): observed effects are below detectable threshold — cannot distinguish from noise at current sample size
Escalating cost in 'multi-session-build' x 'baseline': cost increases across sessions (slope=0.104)
